title: Fix Codex CLI invocation compatibility
description: Update the LangGraph runner's Codex worker invocation so it matches the installed Codex CLI syntax. The current call fails with: unexpected argument '--approval-mode' found. Inspect codex --help and codex exec --help if available, remove or replace unsupported flags, and make the runner fall back to outbox mode with a clear error if Codex invocation fails. Add README notes. Do not modify app UI.
